name: Control Which Countries are Available in your Checkout
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto by Maropost control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Click "}, {"text": "Available Countries", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "From here you can choose your sort order or set particular countries to inactive."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Select the countries you wish to make inactive, scroll down to the bottom of the page and click "}, {"text": "With x Selected", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and then click "}, {"text": "Mark Selected as Inactive", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ">"}]}]
